emails.subject: IT Infrastructure plan
emails.body: IT Infrastructure plan Kim mentioned that you're on the phone. Jenny designated the Disaster Recovery piece ($10M) and some other items as Capital Expenses, and we neglected to include this in our schedule. The total capital budget is $14.7M. I presume that you'll want to include this amount? What we currently have is expense plan of 24.9M with a 1.2 multiple equals 30.2m. I think we'll want to amend it 24.9M expense 14.7M capital 39.6M total (would you still want a multiple to increase to 47.5M?) We have a call in for En Ops as well to make sure that there isn't any potential capital plan we might need to include. Please let me know!

emails.subject: RE: IT Infrastructure plan
emails.body: RE: IT Infrastructure plan Put in -its important Could you return my books To: Kitchen, Louise

emails.subject: RE: IT Infrastructure plan
emails.body: do you still want the multiple (so that it will be 47.5 instead of 39.6) To: Killen, Faith
